arts.ttl: Craig Bellamy says ‘romantic’ Montenegro return for Joe Allen would be a gamble
arts.sum: The 34-year-old Swansea midfielder has made only a handful of cameo appearances from the bench since April 1.

arts.ttl: Bellamy: Discipline and good habits will lead to Wales growth
arts.sum: Wales boss Craig Bellamy has called on his players to strive for greater consistency within games to allow his side to grow heading into their UEFA Nations League encounter with Montenegro in Cardiff.

arts.ttl: Brennan Johnson banned and midfield worries – Wales v Montenegro talking points
arts.sum: A 2-2 draw in Iceland on Friday saw Craig Bellamy to become the first Dragons manager to be unbeaten in his first three games.
